Python Package Development

This project includes simple geometry classes.

Features

  • Point class (x, y coordinates)

  • Line class (distance calculation)

  • Unit tests

Create two points and define a line between them.

Example:

  • Create Point(0,0) and Point(3,4)

  • Create a Line between them

  • Calculate distance

  • Implemented Point and Line classes

  • Wrote unit tests

  • Learned Git basics

  • Created documentation using Sphinx

Python Package Development
